title: Contention + crash-recovery smoke test (untested paths from audit_gen1 §4)
description: Exercise every path audit_gen1 flagged as untested, capturing real outputs into .harness/logs/smoke_contention_report.md: (1) busy refusal between two distinct holders (exit 1); (2) TTL steal: acquire --ttl 1, wait 2s, acquire as another holder -> stole_expired:true event; (3) lease expiry: create scratch task T-090 via add-task, claim with --lease 1, wait 2s, run status -> claim_expired event + auto-release to open; (4) blocked path: claim T-090, update --status blocked, back to open; (5) failed path: update T-090 --status failed with note 'smoke artifact (T-010)' -> reputation tasks_failed bump for its holder. Clean: zero lock/claim residue after.
acceptance_criteria: events.jsonl gains >=1 lock_acquired with stole_expired:true (TTL steal) and >=1 claim_expired (lease auto-release)
busy refusal between two distinct holders demonstrated with captured exit 1 output
blocked and failed paths exercised on scratch task T-090; reputation tasks_failed bumped for its holder
.harness/logs/smoke_contention_report.md contains every command with observed output; zero lock/claim residue at the end
